title: Unsupported OpenAPI version 3.2.0
problemSignature: Redocly rejected user OpenAPI spec version 3.2.0 during parseOpenAPI bundling.
rationale: User-authored OpenAPI specs should surface parser failures at the input boundary; parseOpenAPI now maps Redocly's unsupported OpenAPI version error to a non-reportable ParseError.
fixSummary: Classified unsupported OpenAPI version bundler failures as CliError ParseError with spec path context.
